profile: Frontend Developer with 4+ years of experience building production web applications. Specialize in React and Next.js, with a strong focus on creating scalable component libraries and design systems using Storybook. Passionate about translating business requirements into clean, maintainable code and ensuring high-performance user experiences. Recently contributed to a full-cycle development of an e-commerce and CRM platform for a leading Apple repair service in Poland.

skills.name: Frontend Core
skills.value: JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Sass/SCSS, CSS Modules, Bootstrap, Responsive Design

skills.name: Frameworks & Libraries
skills.value: React, Next.js, Angular, React Hooks, React Query, Context API, Zustand, Redux Toolkit, Redux Thunk, Storybook

skills.name: API & Integration
skills.value: RESTful APIs, GraphQL, Async/Await, Axios, Fetch API

skills.name: Tools & Workflow
skills.value: Git (GitHub/GitLab), feature branch workflow, Vite, Webpack, Prisma, Supabase, Figma

education.name: Belarusian State University of Food and Chemical Technologies | 2015 – 2020. “Technology of Fermentation and Winemaking
Frontend Development Course | RS School (The Rolling Scopes) | 2022

experience.name: Frontend Developer
experience.project: Online store for sale and repair of Apple Equipment | thechoice.pl (Warsaw, Poland)
experience.description: Developed and maintained a dynamic e-commerce platform, optimizing the user interface for a seamless and engaging customer experience.
role: Designed and developed a reusable component library from scratch using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, significantly speeding up the development of new pages and features.
Built and maintained the project's Storybook, documenting UI components to ensure consistency across the application and facilitate collaboration between developers and designers.
Integrated frontend components with the backend and CRM system, enabling seamless submission of customer repair requests directly from the website's interactive forms.
Implemented responsive UI for key sections including the transparent price list, service booking flow, and 'FAQ' page, ensuring a smooth experience across all devices.
Collaborated closely with UI/UX designers to translate Figma mockups into pixel-perfect, high-performance React components.
